feedback.text: While the provided information is aimed at improving digital commerce, an area of note which does not appear to have been discussed is of companies revoking licenses for purchased digital products for any or no reason and providing no alternative route to access these. Recent examples include in programs such as film and audio editing software and this is also common practice in the Gaming industry. Furthermore the requiring of accounts to be created and linked is often used for data harvesting purposes and oftentimes refusal to agree to these terms prohibits access to a product, I would recommend that it be mandated, this is an opt in system and cannot be tied to product access.
